actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / FH-LSZ chunk034 generic target-timeseries checkpoint

required_measurement_objects: O_H or radial canonical-Higgs observable on the same Cl3/Z3 source surface
source_higgs_guard.strict_limit: Finite-mode source-Higgs rows are not pole residues and must not be treated as source-Higgs Gram purity or canonical-Higgs normalization evidence until the source-Higgs certificate builder, Gram-purity postprocessor, and retained-route gates pass.

required_measurement_objects: fitted dM_W/ds or dM_Z/ds under the same scalar source
wz_response_guard.strict_limit: This QCD top-correlator harness does not measure W/Z mass response.  Static EW algebra or absent W/Z slopes must not be used as dM_W/ds evidence.

exact_next_action: After each future chunk completes, rerun the combiner, ready-set, response-stability, autocorrelation/ESS, and this generic checkpoint; do not use a partial chunk as physical y_t evidence.
proposal_allowed_reason: A single L12 chunk is partial support; target ESS, response stability, pole/FV/IR/model-class, and Higgs identity gates remain open.
strict_non_claims: does not use one chunk as retained evidence
does not treat partial L12 chunks as combined L12 evidence
does not treat target time series as canonical-Higgs identity
does not treat absent or guarded source-Higgs/WZ rows as evidence
does not use H_unit, Ward authority, observed target values, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0 as proof input
verdict: L12_T24 chunk034 is audited by the reusable target-timeseries checkpoint.  A passing row means the chunk has production-phase metadata, numba_gauge_seed_v1 seed control, same-source dE/ds, same-source C_ss(q), and per-configuration target series.  It remains partial L12 support only, not retained closure.
